PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPL. & NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE, A CA CORP SERVED APR-03-2001, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT BURNS, JEFFREY
